projectName: ValkyriePrime — The Fractionalized NFT-Collateralized Credit Protocol
description: ValkyriePrime is a venture-scale liquidity protocol designed to bridge the gap between illiquid NFT assets and DeFi credit markets. The system operates through four primary subsystems: 1. The Asset Vault Layer, which handles the locking of blue-chip NFTs and issues fractionalized 'Credit-Shards' (ERC-1155). 2. The Credit Engine, which calculates real-time borrowing power based on floor price oracles and shard distribution. 3. The Liquidity Router, which automatically deploys borrowed USDC into U
angle: Unlocks liquidity for high-value NFT collections by combining ERC-1155 fractionalization with an automated credit line backed by Uniswap V3 LP positions.
